title: Amsterdam Neighborhoods Decoded: Where to Stay and Why
description: A practical neighborhood guide to Amsterdam — Centrum, Jordaan, De Pijp, Oud-West, Plantage, Oud-Zuid, Noord. Vibe, cost, and trip-fit for each.

title: Best Time to Visit Amsterdam: A Month-by-Month Guide
description: When to visit Amsterdam by month — weather, festivals, daylight, tulip timing, and crowds. A practical traveler guide for picking the right window.

title: Top Day Trips from Amsterdam by Train
description: The best day-trips reachable by train from Amsterdam Centraal — Haarlem, Utrecht, Delft, The Hague, Rotterdam, Keukenhof, with travel times and ticket tips.
